collect_platform_feedback_package: no source text, answers, prompts, personal profiles, or secrets
package_adopter_evidence_archive: no raw source, answers, prompts, Agent endpoints, model keys, support bundle private payloads, or private platform context
package_published_image_evidence: manifest platforms and docker-images workflow classifications
no raw source, answers, prompts, Agent endpoints, model keys, support bundle private payloads, or local absolute paths
publish_public_support_status: no raw source, answers, prompts, Agent endpoints, model keys, or private platform context
review_deployment_path: Skill Mode, published image, and source build modes present
run_platform_field_rehearsal: schema mismatch, gateway, auth, naming, timeout, localhost, package corruption, and version drift fixtures
verify_agent_eval_marketplace_enforcemen: optional external judge runtimes fail as skipped evidence unless required
required judge mode exits non-zero when a configured judge is missing or invalid
verify_learning_enrichment_bridge: strict second-brain handoff excludes learner answers
verify_release_asset_adoption: required release zip assets and pack manifest hashes are metadata-only

agent_unhealthy: Keep model credentials in the user's Agent, then rerun verify_agent_gateway_hardening.py.
Use fake deterministic provider only to isolate Study Anything runtime issues.
evidence_not_redacted: Do not share raw source, answers, endpoints, model keys, or browser/video context.
Rerun this verifier and share only the generated redacted report.
runtime_unreachable: Use Skill Mode when Docker or registry pulls are unreliable.
tool_import_failed: Use platform/generated/study-anything-tool-catalog.md as a manual mapping fallback.
Confirm management endpoints are absent from the imported OpenAPI asset.

failure_remediation: Regenerate the pack with generate_platform_adoption_pack.py.
operator_steps.operator_action: Unzip the adoption pack and open ADOPTION_PACK_README.md plus manifest.json.

failure_remediation: Use the tool catalog when the host OpenAPI importer is incomplete.
operator_steps.operator_action: Import OpenAPI or OpenAI-compatible tool assets into the host platform.

failure_remediation: Run scripts/diagnose_adoption.py and follow the returned plan.
operator_steps.operator_action: Start Skill Mode or the published Docker image and verify /v1/health.

failure_remediation: Run verify_agent_gateway_hardening.py before sharing evidence.
operator_steps.operator_action: Point Study Anything at the user's local/private HTTP Agent gateway.

failure_remediation: Fallback to run_skill_mode_demo.sh to separate runtime issues from Agent issues.
operator_steps.operator_action: Run a first lesson with fake demo or the user's HTTP Agent and collect mastery.

failure_remediation: Keep user-owned exports local; share only redacted schema evidence.
operator_steps.operator_action: Export learning package, Obsidian markdown, and second-brain handoff evidence.

failure_remediation: Run verify_plugin_quarantine.py and regenerate the adoption pack before submitting.
operator_steps.operator_action: Review bundled plugin examples, registry digests, and quarantine-first trust policy before proposing any plugin install.

expected_outputs: Skill Mode, published image, and source build modes present
failure_remediation: Run scripts/diagnose_adoption.py and prefer Skill Mode or published images for first-run users.
operator_steps.operator_action: Verify Skill Mode, published-image, source-build, Docker/Compose diagnostics, GHCR fallback, and Agent endpoint recovery before asking an external platform user to deploy.

expected_outputs: strict second-brain handoff excludes learner answers
failure_remediation: Run verify_notebooklm_obsidian_bridge_hardening.py to isolate privacy validation failures.
operator_steps.operator_action: Verify the platform Agent enrichment, HTML micro-lesson, NotebookLM manual bridge, Obsidian export, and second-brain handoff path.

expected_outputs: optional external judge runtimes fail as skipped evidence unless required
required judge mode exits non-zero when a configured judge is missing or invalid
failure_remediation: Keep judge and model credentials in the operator's Agent environment.
Use native fast gates as the baseline and rerun run_external_agent_evals.py with --required only after the external judge runtime is installed.
operator_steps.operator_action: Verify native Agent eval gates and optional external judge contracts before submitting to an external platform or marketplace.

expected_outputs: no source text, answers, prompts, personal profiles, or secrets
failure_remediation: Run diagnose_adoption.py first, then regenerate the feedback package after the import failure is categorized.
operator_steps.operator_action: Verify platform import diagnostics and generate a local-only redacted feedback package before sharing adoption failures.

expected_outputs: schema mismatch, gateway, auth, naming, timeout, localhost, package corruption, and version drift fixtures
failure_remediation: Run verify_platform_field_rehearsal.py without --check to print the current mismatch summary.
Regenerate fixtures only after confirming they remain mock-only and redacted.
operator_steps.operator_action: Verify Kimi, Codex, WorkBuddy, and generic OpenAPI import rehearsals plus the mock failed-import fixture catalog before sharing the pack with external users.

expected_outputs: no raw source, answers, prompts, Agent endpoints, model keys, or private platform context
failure_remediation: Run verify_platform_public_support_status.py without --check to print the current mismatch summary.
Publish only labels, schema names, fixture hashes, and copyable commands.
operator_steps.operator_action: Verify and publish the metadata-only public maintainer status report before asking external users to rely on the pack.

expected_outputs: manifest platforms and docker-images workflow classifications
